mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_stocks (material_id, lot_number, origin, qantity, expiry_date, arrival_date, is_inspected) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{lotNumber}, #{origin}, #{qantity}, #{expiryDate}, #{arrivalDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = quantity + VALUES(quantity), is_inspected = VALUES(is_inspected)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inventory_stocks WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND quantity > 0 ORDER BY expiry_date ASC, created_at ASC
